site_name: Maheba Refugee Settlement, clinic H (North-Western Province)
location_notes: Maheba (Meheba) Refugee Settlement is in North-Western Province of Zambia near Solwezi/Kalumbila. Coordinates approximate the settlement centroid.
time_notes: Study conducted between March and June 2002; day-0 PCR samples collected on inclusion. collection_day is approximate midpoint of the March-June window.
